assertions: Every valid source pin is saved with its search position and evidence links.
Creators and domains are ranked by top-ten appearances, total appearances, and best position.
One bounded structured OpenAI request analyzes the supplied evidence.
Every theme, content gap, and content test cites only supplied Pinterest pin IDs.
The report contains four to eight themes, three to five content gaps, and exactly five content tests.
Theme matching counts use literal terms found in supplied titles and descriptions.
Pins, Sources, and Research Brief use stable Research keys for same-day reruns.
The workflow makes no search-volume, trend-growth, clicks, sales, or demand claims.
